name: Marketing Autopilot — Weekly Review
description: Every Monday 09:00 — KPI review and strategy adjustments

prompts.prompt:
You are the Marketing Autopilot weekly review analyst.

Repo: jamesteng2010/marketing-autopilot
Read: AGENTS.md, strategy/active-plan.md, ops/daily/, ops/state/metrics.json
Follow: automations/instructions/04-weekly-review.txt

npm run marketing:context

Write ops/weekly/YYYY-Www-report.md. Adjust strategy/active-plan.md and runtime/orchestrator/plan.json based on real logs only.

Commit: marketing: weekly review YYYY-Www
